title: Mitsuha Goes to Another World
overview: Yamano Mitsuha is 18 years old when she is suddenly left with no family. It is then that she accidentally falls off a cliff to her certain death... only to wake up in a strange new world!

title: Kingdom of Ambitions
overview: Having acquired the ability to jump between worlds, Mitsuha returns to the village. As she learns more about her new surroundings, her money-making schemes begin to take shape...

title: Mitsuha Plays the Part!
overview: Mitsuha finally arrives at the estate of Count Bozes, only to be turned away at the gate. Now she must find a way to enter the manor, so that she can assume the role of foreign noblewoman, Mitsuha von Yamano!

title: General Store Mitsuha
overview: With the support of Count Bozes, Mitsuha secures the funds to open a general store in the royal capital. Stocked with goods from Japan, Mitsuha's ready to rake it in! If she can make her first sale, that is...

title: Producing a Socialite!
overview: After a visit from the head chef of the Viscount Reiner's family, Mitsuha ends up in charge of the debutante ball for Adelaide, the viscount's daughter. Can she manage to throw a dinner party that's out of this world?

title: Beatrice the Charmer
overview: With the debutante ball a success, Mitsuha's eager to get back to running the shop. However, it seems the Bozes family has different plans! And there's something that's been troubling their daughter, Beatrice...

title: The Adventure of Mitsuha
overview: After a run-in with a fugitive, Mitsuha approaches the mercenaries who saved her with a curious proposal: allow her to tag along on one of their adventures. Her goal? To perform market research, of course!

title: Mitsuha Visits the Royal Palace
overview: An adorable and elegant blonde girl by the name of Sabine visits the shop. Mitsuha manages to save Sabine from being kidnapped by a ruffian, but as it turns out, there's more to Sabine than meets the eye...

title: Tales From Paradise Restaurant
overview: Mitsuha is visited by Alina, whose family runs a restaurant on the verge of being taken over. With trouble brewing in paradise, it's up to Mitsuha to use every trick up her sleeve to save this mom-and-pop business!

title: Then Let It Be War
overview: Mitsuha is hatching a new money-making scheme when news arrives that the kingdom is under attack! As the invading army closes in on the capital, Mitsuha finds herself at the palace, faced with a decision...

title: The Messenger Goes Into Battle
overview: Mitsuha and the captain successfully repel a horde of goblins, thanks to a stroke of ingenuity. Now it's up to Mitsuha to rouse the mercenaries of Wolf's Fang to action, so they can confront the Empire's army!

title: Saving 80,000 Gold in Another World
overview: The Great Ancestral Dragon appears to reinforce the Empire, but Mitsuha will stop at nothing to protect her kingdom!
